novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: The drafter handoff literature checklist is missing, so the theorem-mapped 4-10 paper seed list was not auditable even though §5 is broad.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1 / Related work
novelty_flags.one_line: LeeBareinboim2020PartialObservability is described as showing the partial-observability decision problem is NP-complete, but the paper states NP-completeness conditional on its completeness conjecture.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Add the missing theorem-mapped literature checklist with one line per paper tying it to Theorem 1, Conjecture 1, or Theorem 2; include LeeGhassamiShpitser2024, TikkaHyttinenKarvanen2021, LeeBareinboim2020, LeeCorreaBareinboim2020, Kivva2022, and CorreaTianBareinboim2019.
Correct the GID-PO comparison to say NP-completeness is conditional on the paper's completeness conjecture, then restate why source-cover is not just GID-PO with selection labels.
Pin the exact Lee-Ghassami-Shpitser algorithm failure branch being targeted and add a corollary translating that branch into the source-cover failed district request.
Sharpen the binary-witness assumption by either restricting the conjecture to binary observed alphabets or stating an alphabet-preserving finite witness version.

recommended_next_step: Revise the literature checklist and GID-PO comparison, then keep Conjecture 1 narrowly anchored to the named Lee-Ghassami-Shpitser witness gap.
